center.name: 火山口湖
center.summary: 火山口湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括馬島潛鴨，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species exclusively lives in inland wetlands in Madagascar, where it is endemic. Currently, the only wild populations are at Lake Sofia and Lake Matsaborimena. Historically, the birds preferred shallow lakes and marshes with dense vegetation; however, the rediscovered population was found in a cold, deep crater lake that had few aquatic plants and was surrounded by heavy forest, and other remote crater lakes may have been inhabitable due to the birds' requirements for shallower water. Its previous habitat in the Lake Alaotra basin was disturbed by rice cultivation and invasive introduced fishes
